'''pajudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oakling|oakling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-j-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oakling|oakling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pajudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæjidhith|pæjidhith]] || [[word:pæjidhij|pæjidhij]] || [[word:pæjidhish|pæjidhish]] || [[word:pæjidhi|pæjidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pajujudhuth|pajujudhuth]] || [[word:pajujudhuj|pajujudhuj]] || [[word:pajujudhush|pajujudhush]] || [[word:pajujudhu|pajujudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pajudhuth|pajudhuth]] || [[word:pajudhuj|pajudhuj]] || [[word:pajudhush|pajudhush]] || [[word:pajudhu|pajudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pajufdhuth|pajufdhuth]] || [[word:pajufdhuj|pajufdhuj]] || [[word:pajufdhush|pajufdhush]] || [[word:pajufdhuf|pajufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pajudhuthu|pajudhuthu]] || [[word:pajudhuju|pajudhuju]] || [[word:pajudhushu|pajudhushu]] || [[word:pajudhuku|pajudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pajudhuth|pajudhuth]] || [[word:pajudhuj|pajudhuj]] || [[word:pajudhush|pajudhush]] || [[word:pajudhu|pajudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pajudhuthul|pajudhuthul]] || [[word:pajudhujul|pajudhujul]] || [[word:pajudhushul|pajudhushul]] || [[word:pajudhukul|pajudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pajudhuthuthu|pajudhuthuthu]] || [[word:pajudhujuju|pajudhujuju]] || [[word:pajudhushushu|pajudhushushu]] || [[word:pajudhuku|pajudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pajudhuthun|pajudhuthun]] || [[word:pajudhujun|pajudhujun]] || [[word:pajudhushun|pajudhushun]] || [[word:pajudhukun|pajudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pajudhuthuoro|pajudhuthuoro]] || [[word:pajudhujuoro|pajudhujuoro]] || [[word:pajudhushuoro|pajudhushuoro]] || [[word:pajudhukuoro|pajudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
